html:
Exclusive to:

Tab Icon.

The Chairs Tab is a crafting category exclusive to the Hamlet DLC. It is found under the Renovate Tab. All Chairs can be rotated in multiple directions.

Craftable Items and Structures

The following items and structures can be acquired in the Chairs Tab:

Name Recipe Description Spawn Code

Fancy Chaise		 ×15 "Hoity toity place for your bottom." deco_chaise

Classic Chair		 ×2 "A rosy little chair." deco_chair_classic

Corner Chair		 ×2 "For side sitting." deco_chair_corner

Bench		 ×2 "The ominous look." deco_chair_bench

Horned Chair		 ×2 "Grim and comfortable." deco_chair_horned

Footrest		 ×2 "Take a load off." deco_chair_footrest

Lounge Chair		 ×2 "Molded wood." deco_chair_lounge

Massager Chair		 ×2 "You'll never need another chair." deco_chair_massager

Stuffed Chair		 ×2 "Bagged." deco_chair_stuffed

Rocking Chair		 ×2 "It rocks." deco_chair_rocking

Ottoman Chair		 ×2 "You oughta love it!" deco_chair_ottoman

Gallery

  • Chairs concept art and textures
DSTDSRoGSWHam
plainText:
Exclusive to:
Tab Icon.
The Chairs Tab is a crafting category exclusive to the Hamlet DLC. It is found under the Renovate Tab. All Chairs can be rotated in multiple directions.
Craftable Items and Structures[edit | edit source]
The following items and structures can be acquired in the Chairs Tab:
Name
Recipe
Description
Spawn Code
Fancy Chaise
×15
"Hoity toity place for your bottom."
deco_chaise
“A chair to chaise after.”
–Wilson, when examining a Fancy Chaise
“It'd be better if I could burn it.”
–Willow, when examining a Fancy Chaise
“Is big like Wolfgang.”
–Wolfgang, when examining a Fancy Chaise
“A place to sit and contemplate my demise.”
–Wendy, when examining a Fancy Chaise
“SITTING ACCESSORY ACQUIRED”
–WX-78, when examining a Fancy Chaise
“A nice place to read a book.”
–Wickerbottom, when examining a Fancy Chaise
“Looks cozy.”
–Woodie, when examining a Fancy Chaise
“A chair to lounge in.”
–Maxwell, when examining a Fancy Chaise
“Lavish.”
–Wagstaff, when examining a Fancy Chaise
“A place tö rest after a hard day's battle.”
–Wigfrid, when examining a Fancy Chaise
“That looks comfy.”
–Webber, when examining a Fancy Chaise
“Can I sleep on it?”
–Walani, when examining a Fancy Chaise
“I do enjoy a nice chaise lounge.”
–Warly, when examining a Fancy Chaise
“It be a captain's chair fer two.”
–Woodlegs, when examining a Fancy Chaise
“'TIS CHAIR O' TWO PIGGIES”
–Wilba, when examining a Fancy Chaise
“Sitting thing”
–Wormwood, when examining a Fancy Chaise
“A nice big chair to make my place look homey.”
–Wheeler, when examining a Fancy Chaise

title: Chairs Tab
wikitext:
{{Exclusivity|Hamlet}} [[File:Chairs.png|thumb|104x104px|Tab Icon.]] The '''Chairs Tab''' is a crafting category exclusive to the ''[[Don't Starve: Hamlet|Hamlet]]'' DLC. It is found under the [[Renovate Tab]]. All Chairs can be rotated in multiple directions. == Craftable Items and Structures == The following items and structures can be acquired in the Chairs Tab: {| class="wikitable" style="text-align:center;" |- ! scope="col" style="text-align:center;" |Name ! scope="col" style="text-align:center;" |Recipe ! scope="col" style="text-align:center;" |Description ! scope="col" style="text-align:center;" |Spawn Code |- | [[File:Fancy Chaise.png|32px]]
